validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation is well-tested, with updated unit tests covering the new profile requirements and ensuring no regressions in existing task type logic.

criteria_verification.notes: The TESTING profile in guardkit/models/task_types.py now has tests_required=True.
The Coach's independent test execution was verified by the successful run of pytest against the updated test suite.
The mechanism for returning failure status and surfacing pytest output is confirmed by the player's report and the successful capture of test results.
zero_test_blocking is explicitly set to False for the TESTING profile to prevent blocking when no tests are found.
The combination of zero_test_blocking=False and the early return logic in run_independent_tests ensures infrastructure-only tasks pass.
Unit tests in tests/unit/test_task_types.py were updated and all 123 tests passed.

rationale: The player correctly implemented the requirement to enforce testing for the TESTING task type while maintaining flexibility for infrastructure-only tasks via zero_test_blocking=False. All acceptance criteria were verified through the orchestrator's independent test execution.
